---
title: "Laurian Kaijage"
subtitle: "Marine Scientist | Data Analyst"
image: image/profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaijage-laurian-msc-73105617b?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=ios_app
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: lauriankaijage@gmail.com
---

## Welcome

Hello! I'm Laurian Kaijage, a marine scientist with expertise in ecological data management and coastal conservation. Currently, I work at **Mwambao Coastal Community Network** as the Ecological Data Manager, where I focus on biodiversity monitoring, data analysis, and supporting conservation initiatives.

## My Focus Areas

- **Marine Ecology**: Understanding coastal ecosystems and biodiversity
- **Data Management**: Collecting, analyzing, and visualizing ecological data
- **Conservation**: Supporting community-based conservation efforts
- **Research**: Contributing to marine science through rigorous fieldwork and analysis for data analysis
